goal: Fix hachure.org mobile gutters and prose variable typography without changing site content.
root_causes: Later component padding shorthands on .site-header, .hero, .section, and .status-footer override .site-wrapper horizontal padding because they are equal specificity and later in styles.css.
Global and page-specific inline code rules force prose variable names into IBM Plex Mono, clashing with Fraunces body copy.
next_agent_instructions: Implement the plan in the markdown artifact. Keep the fix focused on CSS padding logical properties and inline code typography. Verify with mobile browser screenshots/computed styles on / and /trust.html.
